client_secret.description: Stripe secret API key (sk_...). Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Stripe API base URL override for tests or proxies.

account_id.description: Optional Stripe account ID; sent as the Stripe-Account header for Connect.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects created at or after this time are read.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
